definitions.nontrivial_snark: simple, cubic, bridgeless, girth >= 5, cyclically 4-edge-connected, chromatic index 4
definitions.cubic_g5_source: all simple connected cubic graphs of girth >= 5 from nauty geng (-d3 -D3 -c -tf), one per line in graph6 format
definitions.filter_pipeline: scripts/catalogue.py classifies each graph and keeps those matching --filter nontrivial-snark
